mapper.sql: cg.grp_id, cg.grp_nm, cg.ord_seq as grp_odr, cg.use_yn,

if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
cg.grp_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
cg.grp_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
vhi.hr_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
jbrp.minor_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_group cg WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT thi.hr_id, thi.hr_nm, thi.sex_div, thi.birth_dt, thi.sabun, thi.orgn_id, thi.jbrp, thi.part_comp_id, thi.working_at, thi.fire_at, thi.remark, thi.use_yn, thi.created_at, thi.created_by, thi.updated_at, thi.updated_by, thi.user_id, thi.risk_ass_role, tui.email, tui.phone, tui.signature, ( SELECT STRING_AGG(traocor.orgn_role_nm, ', ' ORDER BY traocor.orgn_role_nm) FROM esg.tb_safety_duties_doc_user tsddu LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_duties_doc tsdd ON tsddu.write_year = tsdd.write_year AND tsddu.doc_no = tsdd.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role traocor ON tsdd.comp_id = traocor.comp_id AND tsdd.orgn_role_id = traocor.orgn_role_id AND traocor.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE thi.hr_id = tsddu.hr_id ) AS risk_ass_role_nm, jbrp.jbrp_nm FROM esg.tb_hr_info thi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_user_info tui ON thi.user_id::text = tui.user_id::text LEFT JOIN esg.tb_group_hr_map ghm ON thi.hr_id = ghm.hr_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on (jbrp.jbrp_id = thi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} ) WHERE 1=1 AND ghm.grp_id = #{grpId} and ghm.comp_id = #{compId}
LIMIT #{listSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC} OFFSET #{listStart, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT cg.grp_id, cg.grp_nm, cg.ord_seq as grp_odr, cg.use_yn, count(ghm.*) as count FROM esg.tb_group cg left join esg.tb_group_hr_map ghm on cg.comp_id = ghm.comp_id and cg.grp_id = ghm.grp_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND cg.comp_id=#{compId}
GROUP BY cg.grp_id, cg.grp_nm, cg.use_yn, cg.ord_seq ORDER BY cg.ord_seq LIMIT #{listSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC} OFFSET #{listStart, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT
created_at, updated_at, 'U' cmd FROM esg.tb_group cg WHERE cg.grp_id = #{grpId} and cg.comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(grp_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as grp_id from esg.tb_group where grp_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%';
INSERT INTO esg.tb_group ( comp_id, grp_id, grp_nm, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{grpId}, #{grpNm}, #{grpOdr}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
INSERT INTO esg.tb_group_hr_map ( comp_id, grp_id, hr_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{grpId}, #{hrId}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_group SET grp_id = #{grpId}, grp_nm = #{grpNm}, ord_seq = #{grpOdr}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE grp_id = #{grpId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM esg.tb_group_hr_map WHERE grp_id = #{grpId} AND comp_id = #{compId} AND hr_id = #{hrId};
mapper.select: SELECT temp_grp_id , grp_nm , grp_desc as desc , ord_seq FROM dataset.tb_dataset_group WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY ord_seq ASC
mapper.insert: insert into esg.tb_group ( comp_id, grp_id, grp_nm, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) select #{compId} as comp_id , #{tempGrpId} , grp_nm , ord_seq , 'Y' as use_yn , now() as created_at , #{createdBy} as created_by from dataset.tb_dataset_group where temp_grp_id = #{tempGrpId}

insert into esg.tb_group_menu ( comp_id, grp_id, menu_id, add_ah, sav_ah, del_ah, exl_ah, upl_ah, dwn_ah, fn1_ah, fn2_ah, fn3_ah, created_at, created_by, param ) select #{compId} as comp_id , #{tempGrpId} , menu_id , add_ah , sav_ah , del_ah , exl_ah , upl_ah , dwn_ah , fn1_ah , fn2_ah , fn3_ah , now() as created_at , #{createdBy} as created_by , param from dataset.tb_dataset_group_menu where temp_grp_id = #{tempGrpId}
